name: AVALON HOLDINGS CORP
summary: Avalon Holdings Corporation operates two business segments: waste management services and golf and related operations. Waste management includes hazardous and nonhazardous waste disposal brokerage, captive landfill management, and saltwater injection well operations serving industrial, commercial, municipal, and governmental customers in northeastern and midwestern U.S. markets. Golf and related operations include four golf courses, a hotel (The Grand Resort), fitness centers, tennis courts, salon and spa, dermatology center, and dining and banquet facilities.

products.name: Waste Disposal Brokerage and Management Services
products.description: Hazardous and nonhazardous waste disposal brokerage and management for industrial, commercial, municipal, and governmental customers in northeastern and midwestern U.S.

products.name: Captive Landfill Management
products.description: Turnkey technical and operational services including daily operations and facilities management for customer-owned captive disposal facilities.

products.name: Saltwater Injection Well Operations
products.description: Ownership and operation of saltwater injection wells and related facilities through AWMS Holdings, LLC subsidiaries.

products.name: Golf and Country Club Operations
products.description: Operation and management of four golf courses and related clubhouses under the Avalon Golf and Country Club brand.

products.name: The Grand Resort
products.description: Hotel and resort featuring pools, fitness center, restaurants, bars, spa, banquet and conference facilities in Howland, Ohio.

products.name: Avalon Med Spa
products.description: Elective nonsurgical aesthetic services under licensed physician supervision, located in Warren, Ohio.

products.name: Avalon Dermatology
products.description: Dermatology services provided by a board-licensed dermatologist, located in Warren, Ohio.

products.name: Avalon Athletic Club at Boardman
products.description: Multipurpose recreation center with indoor tennis, basketball, volleyball, pickleball courts, and fitness area in Boardman, Ohio.
